hero.title: Adriana Sánchez
hero.description: I build modern, clear, and functional interfaces that connect design, product, and user experience.

about.title: I design and build digital experiences focused on clarity, functionality, and product thinking.
about.description: I’m a Frontend Developer focused on building modern, well-structured interfaces designed for users. I enjoy turning ideas into clear experiences, collaborating with design and development to create real products.

stack.title: Technologies and tools I work with
stack.description: I mainly work on frontend, building scalable interfaces, complex forms, tables, editing flows, and user-centered experiences within real products.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.description: A selection of projects that reflect my experience building interfaces, solving UI challenges, and working on real product flows.

items.title: Altafid
items.description: I contributed to the frontend development of a fintech platform for advisors and financial institutions, working on scalable interfaces, complex tables, forms, editing flows, and user-centered product experiences.

items.title: E-commerce Project
items.description: Personal project built to strengthen frontend architecture, reusable components, and product thinking.

items.title: Portfolio
items.description: Personal website designed to present my experience, projects, and technical profile in a modern and professional way.

experience.title: Professional journey
experience.description: Experiences that have strengthened my profile in frontend development, leadership, collaboration, and digital product building.

items.description: I’m part of a collaborative development team working with agile methodologies. I contribute to building and maintaining scalable web interfaces using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and SCSS. I actively participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and technical documentation, collaborating through tools such as Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and Bitbucket.

I led teams and contributed to the frontend development of collaborative projects, supporting team organization, communication, and the delivery of functional solutions. This experience strengthened my leadership, teamwork, and technical execution in remote environments.

I supported students throughout their learning process by assisting with exercises, pair programming, and collaborative dynamics. I also contributed to team integration, soft-skill development, and the continuous improvement of bootcamp processes.

I have a previous background in administrative coordination, people leadership, and operational management across different environments. This experience strengthened key skills such as organization, communication, process follow-up, cross-functional collaboration, and results orientation.

contact.title: Let’s connect
contact.description: You can find me here for opportunities, collaborations, or just to say hello.
